title: Marketplace Manager - Titan Eyeplus Global Group - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Titan Eyeplus Global Group - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Titan Eyeplus Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Pune-based team.

About Titan Eyeplus Global Group:
Titan Eyeplus Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Titan Eyeplus Global Group!
